name: Export Generators
description: Generates output YAML for four downstream tools (Pact, Arbiter, Baton, Sentinel) by consulting the schema store and annotation propagation table generically. Each exporter is a pure function that filters propagation entries by semantic rule properties — never by hard-coded annotation names — ensuring custom annotations with propagation rules defined in ledger.yaml produce output without code changes. A shared iter_propagation_entries() helper yields field-level tuples from the propagation table, and a yaml_dump() utility serializes any export model to deterministic, diffable YAML.

types.name: ExportViolationSeverity
types.description: Severity levels for export violations, supporting the collect-all-errors requirement.

types.name: ExportViolation

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Severity level of this violation.

fields.name: field_path
fields.description: Dot-delimited path to the field that triggered the violation, e.g. 'users.email'.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Human-readable description of the violation.

fields.name: annotation_key
fields.description: The annotation key involved, if applicable. Empty string if not annotation-specific.

types.description: A single violation encountered during export generation. Structural problems are ERROR, missing annotations are WARNING, informational notes are INFO.

types.name: PropagationEntry

fields.name: field_ref
fields.description: Fully qualified field reference, e.g. 'schema.table.column'.

fields.name: annotation_key
fields.description: The annotation identifier, e.g. 'PII', 'FINANCIAL', or any custom annotation.

fields.name: rule
fields.description: Property bag from ledger.yaml propagation rules. Keys include semantic properties like requires_masking, canary_eligible, severity, tier, etc. Extensible for custom annotations.

fields.name: field_type
fields.description: The data type of the field (e.g. 'string', 'integer', 'boolean').

fields.name: component_id
fields.description: The component that owns this field's schema.

types.description: A single entry from the annotation propagation table. The rule dict preserves extensibility — custom annotations add arbitrary keys without code changes.

types.name: PropagationEntryTuple

fields.name: field_ref
fields.description: Fully qualified field reference.

fields.name: annotation_key
fields.description: The annotation identifier.

fields.name: rule_properties
fields.description: Semantic properties from the propagation rule payload.

fields.name: field_type
fields.description: Data type of the underlying field.

fields.name: component_id
fields.description: Owning component identifier.

types.description: Yielded tuple from iter_propagation_entries: (field_ref, annotation_key, rule_properties).

types.name: PactAssertion

fields.name: assertion_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this assertion, deterministically derived from field_ref and annotation_key.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of what this assertion verifies.

fields.name: test_type
fields.description: Type of test: 'shape', 'filter', 'method', derived from propagation rule properties.

fields.name: field_ref
fields.description: Fully qualified field reference this assertion targets.

fields.name: filter
fields.description: Filter expression derived from propagation rules. Empty string if not applicable.

fields.name: shape
fields.description: Shape constraint derived from propagation rules. Empty string if not applicable.

fields.name: method
fields.description: Verification method derived from propagation rules. Empty string if not applicable.

types.description: A single Pact contract assertion derived from propagation rules. Used in component-scoped contract assertion YAML.

types.name: PactExport

fields.name: component_id
fields.description: The component this Pact export targets.

fields.name: assertions
fields.description: List of contract assertions sorted by assertion_id for deterministic output.

types.description: Top-level container for Pact export output. Contains component-scoped assertion lists.

types.name: ArbiterRule

fields.name: pattern
fields.description: Field matching pattern, e.g. '*.email' or 'users.ssn'.

fields.name: backend
fields.description: Storage backend identifier where this rule applies.

fields.name: tier
fields.description: Classification tier: PUBLIC, INTERNAL, PII, FINANCIAL, etc.

fields.name: annotations
fields.description: List of annotation keys applied to this field.

fields.name: taint_on_raw_value
fields.description: Whether raw value access taints the data flow.

fields.name: mask_in_spans
fields.description: Whether this field should be masked in observability spans.

types.description: A single Arbiter field-level classification rule for data governance.

types.name: ArbiterExport

fields.name: rules
fields.description: List of classification rules sorted by pattern for deterministic output.

types.description: Top-level container for Arbiter export output.

types.name: BatonEgressNode

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this egress node.

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Component that owns this egress point.

fields.name: mock_generator
fields.description: Reference to the mock data generator (faker provider or stdlib random function).

fields.name: masked_fields
fields.description: Fields with non-PUBLIC classification that require masking at egress.

fields.name: canary_eligible_fields
fields.description: String-typed fields with PII or FINANCIAL annotations (via canary_eligible rule property) eligible for canary value injection.

types.description: A single Baton egress node describing a data exit point with mock and masking metadata.

types.name: BatonExport

fields.name: egress_nodes
fields.description: List of egress nodes sorted by id for deterministic output.

types.description: Top-level container for Baton export output.

types.name: SentinelSeverityMapping

fields.name: annotation_key
fields.description: The annotation that this severity mapping applies to.

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Severity level string derived from the propagation rule's severity property (e.g. 'CRITICAL', 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW').

fields.name: field_pattern
fields.description: Field pattern this mapping applies to.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of why this severity level was assigned.

types.description: A single Sentinel severity mapping derived from annotation propagation rules.

types.name: SentinelExport

fields.name: severity_mappings
fields.description: List of severity mappings sorted by (severity, annotation_key, field_pattern) for deterministic output.

types.description: Top-level container for Sentinel export output.

types.name: ExportResultPact

fields.name: output
fields.description: The generated Pact export, or None if errors prevented generation.

fields.name: violations
fields.description: All violations collected during generation. May contain warnings even on success.

types.description: Result wrapper for Pact export. Contains typed output and collected violations.

types.name: ExportResultArbiter

fields.name: output
fields.description: The generated Arbiter export, or None if errors prevented generation.

fields.name: violations
fields.description: All violations collected during generation.

types.description: Result wrapper for Arbiter export. Contains typed output and collected violations.

types.name: ExportResultBaton

fields.name: output
fields.description: The generated Baton export, or None if errors prevented generation.

fields.name: violations
fields.description: All violations collected during generation.

types.description: Result wrapper for Baton export. Contains typed output and collected violations.

types.name: ExportResultSentinel

fields.name: output
fields.description: The generated Sentinel export, or None if errors prevented generation.

fields.name: violations
fields.description: All violations collected during generation.

types.description: Result wrapper for Sentinel export. Contains typed output and collected violations.

types.name: YamlString
types.description: A UTF-8 YAML string produced by yaml_dump(). Always uses block style, sort_keys=False.

functions.name: iter_propagation_entries
functions.description: Generic iterator over the propagation table. Yields PropagationEntryTuple for each field+annotation combination from the propagation table. Callers (exporters) apply their own property-based filters. This is the single shared entry point ensuring all exporters use the same traversal logic and custom annotations flow through automatically.

inputs.name: propagation_table
inputs.description: List of PropagationEntry objects from the propagation component.

inputs.name: property_filter
inputs.description: Optional dict of rule property keys to required values. Only entries whose rule contains all specified key-value pairs are yielded. Empty dict yields all entries.

error_data.message: Propagation table is empty; no entries to iterate.

error_cases.name: invalid_entry_structure
error_cases.condition: An entry in propagation_table lacks required fields (field_ref, annotation_key, rule)

preconditions: propagation_table is a list of PropagationEntry objects
property_filter keys and values are strings or booleans
postconditions: Returned list contains only PropagationEntryTuple instances
Every returned entry satisfies all property_filter constraints
Output order is deterministic: sorted by (field_ref, annotation_key)

functions.name: export_pact
functions.description: Generates Pact contract assertion YAML for a given component. Iterates propagation entries and produces assertions with assertion_id, description, test_type, field_ref, and filter/shape/method derived from propagation rule properties. Filters entries where rule contains assertion-relevant properties (test_type, shape, filter, method). Returns ExportResultPact with all violations collected.

inputs.name: component_id
inputs.description: The component to scope Pact assertions to.

inputs.name: propagation_table
inputs.description: List of PropagationEntry objects from the propagation component.

error_data.message: No propagation entries found; Pact export will be empty.

error_cases.name: no_matching_entries
error_cases.condition: No propagation entries match the target component_id

error_data.message: No propagation entries found for component '{component_id}'.

error_cases.name: missing_test_type_property
error_cases.condition: A propagation rule lacks the 'test_type' property required for Pact assertion generation

error_data.message: Propagation rule for field '{field_ref}' annotation '{annotation_key}' missing required 'test_type' property.

error_cases.name: invalid_test_type
error_cases.condition: test_type value is not one of 'shape', 'filter', 'method'

error_data.message: Invalid test_type '{test_type}' for field '{field_ref}'. Must be 'shape', 'filter', or 'method'.

preconditions: propagation_table is a list of PropagationEntry objects
postconditions: If output is not None, output.assertions is sorted by assertion_id
Each assertion_id is unique within the output
All structural errors in propagation entries are reported as ERROR-severity violations
Missing optional annotation properties are reported as WARNING-severity violations
output is None if and only if violations contain at least one ERROR-severity entry

functions.name: export_arbiter
functions.description: Generates Arbiter field-level classification rules YAML. Iterates propagation entries and produces rules with pattern, backend, tier, annotations, taint_on_raw_value, and mask_in_spans derived from propagation rule properties. Filters entries where rule contains tier or classification-relevant properties. Returns ExportResultArbiter with all violations collected.

inputs.name: propagation_table
inputs.description: List of PropagationEntry objects from the propagation component.

inputs.name: default_backend
inputs.description: Default storage backend identifier when rule does not specify one.

error_data.message: No propagation entries found; Arbiter export will be empty.

error_cases.name: missing_tier_property
error_cases.condition: A propagation rule lacks the 'tier' property required for classification

error_data.message: Propagation rule for field '{field_ref}' annotation '{annotation_key}' missing required 'tier' property.

error_cases.name: conflicting_tiers
error_cases.condition: Multiple annotations on the same field specify different tier values

error_data.message: Field '{field_ref}' has conflicting tiers: {tiers}. Using highest classification.

preconditions: propagation_table is a list of PropagationEntry objects
postconditions: If output is not None, output.rules is sorted by pattern
Each (pattern, backend) combination is unique — multiple annotations on the same field are merged into a single rule
taint_on_raw_value is true if any annotation's rule has requires_masking=true or taint_on_raw_value=true
mask_in_spans is true if any annotation's rule has requires_masking=true or mask_in_spans=true
output is None if and only if violations contain at least one ERROR-severity entry

functions.name: export_baton
functions.description: Generates Baton egress_nodes list YAML. Iterates propagation entries and produces egress nodes with id, owner, mock_generator reference, masked_fields (non-PUBLIC tier), and canary_eligible_fields (string-typed fields where rule has canary_eligible=true). Filters on requires_masking and canary_eligible rule properties. Returns ExportResultBaton with all violations collected.

inputs.name: propagation_table
inputs.description: List of PropagationEntry objects from the propagation component.

error_data.message: No propagation entries found; Baton export will be empty.

error_cases.name: missing_mock_generator
error_cases.condition: A propagation rule for a field requiring mocking lacks 'mock_generator' property

error_data.message: No mock_generator specified for field '{field_ref}'; will use default generator.

error_cases.name: non_string_canary_field
error_cases.condition: A field with canary_eligible=true has a non-string field_type

error_data.message: Field '{field_ref}' is canary_eligible but type is '{field_type}' (not string); skipping canary eligibility.

error_cases.name: missing_owner
error_cases.condition: Cannot determine owner component for an egress node

error_data.message: Cannot determine owner for egress node derived from field '{field_ref}'.

preconditions: propagation_table is a list of PropagationEntry objects
postconditions: If output is not None, output.egress_nodes is sorted by id
Each egress node id is unique
masked_fields contains only fields where tier is not PUBLIC (determined by requires_masking rule property)
canary_eligible_fields contains only fields where field_type is 'string' and rule has canary_eligible=true
mock_generator references faker providers for PII/FINANCIAL fields and stdlib random for others
output is None if and only if violations contain at least one ERROR-severity entry

functions.name: export_sentinel
functions.description: Generates Sentinel severity mapping YAML derived from annotation propagation rules. Iterates propagation entries and produces severity mappings keyed by annotation and field pattern, using the 'severity' property from propagation rules. Returns ExportResultSentinel with all violations collected.

inputs.name: propagation_table
inputs.description: List of PropagationEntry objects from the propagation component.

error_data.message: No propagation entries found; Sentinel export will be empty.

error_cases.name: missing_severity_property
error_cases.condition: A propagation rule lacks the 'severity' property

error_data.message: Propagation rule for field '{field_ref}' annotation '{annotation_key}' has no 'severity' property; skipping.

error_cases.name: invalid_severity_value
error_cases.condition: severity property value is not a recognized severity string

error_data.message: Invalid severity '{severity}' for field '{field_ref}' annotation '{annotation_key}'. Expected CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW.

preconditions: propagation_table is a list of PropagationEntry objects
postconditions: If output is not None, output.severity_mappings is sorted by (severity, annotation_key, field_pattern)
Every propagation entry with a 'severity' rule property produces exactly one SentinelSeverityMapping
Entries without a 'severity' rule property are skipped with a WARNING violation
output is None if and only if violations contain at least one ERROR-severity entry

functions.name: yaml_dump
functions.description: Serializes any Pydantic v2 export model to a deterministic YAML string. Uses model.model_dump(exclude_none=True) and yaml.dump(sort_keys=False) to preserve field order from the model definition. Output is stable and diffable.

inputs.name: export_model
inputs.description: A Pydantic v2 BaseModel instance (PactExport, ArbiterExport, BatonExport, or SentinelExport).

error_cases.name: not_a_pydantic_model
error_cases.condition: export_model does not have a model_dump() method

error_data.message: export_model must be a Pydantic v2 BaseModel instance, got {type}.

error_cases.name: yaml_serialization_error
error_cases.condition: yaml.dump raises an error on the model data

error_data.message: Failed to serialize model to YAML: {error}

preconditions: export_model is a Pydantic v2 BaseModel instance with a model_dump() method
export_model is one of PactExport, ArbiterExport, BatonExport, SentinelExport
postconditions: Returned string is valid YAML
None values are excluded from output
Key order matches model field definition order (sort_keys=False)
Calling yaml_dump twice on the same model produces identical output

invariants: All four exporters use iter_propagation_entries() as their sole traversal mechanism over the propagation table — no exporter directly indexes or iterates propagation_table
No exporter hard-codes annotation names (e.g. 'PII', 'FINANCIAL'); all filtering is by semantic rule properties (requires_masking, canary_eligible, severity, tier, test_type, etc.)
Custom annotations defined in ledger.yaml with appropriate propagation rule properties produce correct export output without any code changes to exporters
All export output lists are sorted by deterministic keys for stable, diffable YAML output
Violations are always collected exhaustively — exporters never short-circuit on the first error
An ExportResult output is None if and only if the violations list contains at least one ERROR-severity violation
yaml_dump never normalizes, reorders, or reformats beyond exclude_none — preserving model field definition order
Each exporter is a standalone function — no class hierarchy, no shared mutable state between exporters
Faker is used for mock_generator references on PII/FINANCIAL fields; stdlib random is used for all other mock generation

data_access.rationale: Reads schema field definitions across all classification tiers (PUBLIC, INTERNAL, PII, FINANCIAL) from the registry and propagation table to determine annotation semantics. Reads propagation rules including masking requirements and canary eligibility which reference PII and FINANCIAL field metadata. Writes INTERNAL-tier export YAML artifacts for downstream tool consumption.

side_effects.rationale: Reads all schema fields and their annotations to determine which fields require masking, canary eligibility, classification rules, and severity mappings across all tiers.
Produces YAML export artifacts consumed by Pact, Arbiter, Baton, and Sentinel. These are INTERNAL configuration artifacts derived from schema metadata.

authority.rationale: This component is the sole authority for generating downstream tool YAML output (Pact assertions, Arbiter rules, Baton egress nodes, Sentinel severity mappings). No other component produces these artifacts.
